OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: SmokeTest_AccountSummary
OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "persistentComponent" : [ ], "allowSaveForLater" : false, "saveContentEncoded" : false, "autoSaveOnStepNext" : false, "elementTypeToHTMLTemplateMapping" : { }, "seedDataJSON" : { }, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "enableKnowledge" : false, "bLK" : false, "hideStepChart" : false, "mergeSavedData" : false, "allowCancel" : false, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "autoFocus" : false, "currencyCode" : "", "showInputWidth" : false, "rtpSeed" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "stylesheet" : { "newport" : "", "lightning" : "", "newportRtl" : "", "lightningRtl" : "" }, "stepChartPlacement" : "right", "disableUnloadWarn" : true, "scrollBehavior" : "auto" }
